input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8367 [Automation] native-image run fails for com.sksamuel.hoplite:hoplite-core:3.0.0.RC1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Documentation examples often use YAML resources, but Hoplite requires separate format modules such as hoplite-yaml for YAML/JSON/TOML/HOCON; generated tests for hoplite-core should prefer built-in properties or MapPropertySource unless intentionally testing an integration module.
Hoplite 3.0.0 changes default environment-variable property-source behavior, so tests that exercise default sources should avoid depending on ambient CI environment variables.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Hoplite core is an in-process Kotlin configuration library; the resolved 3.0.0.RC1 artifact depends only on Kotlin stdlib/reflect and coroutines, and meaningful coverage is reachable through built-in core APIs such as MapPropertySource, Java properties parsing, decoders, preprocessors, and resource loaders without Docker, external services, or global environment setup.
